articles.title: LIVE MN - Serie A, Milan-Udinese (0-2): Fofana comes on, the Rossoneri defense crashes on the counterattacks
articles.summary:
67' Nice shot by Fullkrug for Fofana who, however, doesn't control well and then finishes centrally from a good position

66' First substitution for Runjaic who removes Zaniolo and inserts Piotrowski

65' Rabiot tries again...
